rows.source_ref: MIH Bobby, 'EMA Fibonacci Level Trading Strategy', ForexFactory thread 416962 (14 posts, complete), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/416962-ema-fibonacci-level-trading-strategy
rows.concept: Enter on the open of the next candle when price closes above/below (or bounces off) EMA(20) while RSI(10) crosses its 50 line and Stochastic(10,3,3) exits an OB/OS zone, taking profit at Fibonacci-offset levels (0.382/0.618) around the EMA.
rows.eligibility_reason: Pure-MQL5 indicator confluence (EMA/RSI/Stoch) with stated SL/TP; FTMO/DXZ-compatible, but the 'trending vs sideway' regime filter and 'bounce back from EMA' entry are undefined.
rows.notes: Generic MA+RSI+Stoch indicator-soup momentum combo with no structural edge and no correlated-driver fit (not event/energy/JPY/long-vol/session). Author's 'Fibonacci levels' are just 0.382/0.618 offset lines added to the EMA 'Level' tab. No backtest or trading results posted; thread replies (Davit, 4xplosion) themselves debunk OB/OS timing as lagging and suggest divergence instead. Author states M5/M15/H1 all viable (M15 chosen as central). TP variants: EMA-0.382 level or 0.618 level; SL 5-10 pips beyond EMA or 0.382 level for 1:2 RR. Low forum reputability.
